value.stringValue: New shifts are available using Find Work!

textTemplates.name: SOQL_Endorsements
textTemplates.text: SELECT Name,Id,Account__c,IP_Account__c,sirenum__Scheduled_End_Time__c, sirenum__Scheduled_Start_Time__c,Job_Category_Text__c,Apply__c,Site_Postcode__c,Minimum_Pay_Rate__c,Distance__c FROM sirenum__Shift__c WHERE (sirenum__Scheduled_Start_Time__c >= {!FromText}) AND sirenum__Scheduled_Start_Time__c <= {!UntilText} AND Job_Category_Text__c IN ({!JobCollection}) AND sirenum__Cancelled__c = FALSE AND Unfilled_Shift__c = true AND Id NOT IN ({!ShiftList}) AND Id NOT IN ({!ExistingShift}) AND EndorsementID__c IN ({!EndorsementText}) AND IP_Account__c NOT IN ({!AccountExclude}) AND DISTANCE(sirenum__Site__r.sirenum__Coordinates__c, GEOLOCATION({!Get_Candidate.MailingLatitude},{!Get_Candidate.MailingLongitude}), 'mi') < {!Selected_Search_Radius_Value}

textTemplates.name: SOQL_Shift_Invite
textTemplates.text: SELECT sirenum__Shift__c, job__c, sirenum__Status__c,Client_Text__c,Scheduled_Start_Time__c,Scheduled_End_Time__c FROM sirenum__Shift_Invitation__c WHERE sirenum__Contact__c = '{!Get_Candidate.Id}' AND Shift_Date__c >= {!DateFormula}

textTemplates.name: SOQL_Shifts
textTemplates.text: SELECT Name,Id,Account__c,IP_Account__c,sirenum__Scheduled_End_Time__c, sirenum__Scheduled_Start_Time__c,Job_Category_Text__c,Apply__c,Site_Postcode__c,Minimum_Pay_Rate__c,Distance__c FROM sirenum__Shift__c WHERE (sirenum__Scheduled_Start_Time__c >= {!FromText}) AND sirenum__Scheduled_Start_Time__c <= {!UntilText} AND Job_Category_Text__c IN ({!JobCollection}) AND sirenum__Cancelled__c = FALSE AND Unfilled_Shift__c = true AND Id NOT IN ({!ShiftList}) AND Id NOT IN ({!ExistingShift}) AND EndorsementID__c NOT IN ({!EndorsementText}) AND IP_Account__c NOT IN ({!AccountExclude}) AND DISTANCE(sirenum__Site__r.sirenum__Coordinates__c, GEOLOCATION({!Get_Candidate.MailingLatitude},{!Get_Candidate.MailingLongitude}), 'mi') < {!Selected_Search_Radius_Value}
